context_for_next_testing_agent: Force contingency and edit e-CF type features fully implemented and tested. Key points: 1) Uber Eats payment method has force_contingency=true and shows CONTINGENCIA badge in VentasTab, 2) PATCH /api/bills/{bill_id}/ecf-type endpoint requires admin/manager or edit_ecf_type permission, 3) Only CONTINGENCIA bills can have their e-CF type edited, 4) EcfDashboard shows Pencil edit icon for CONTINGENCIA bills.
